
    A photorealistic, appetizing, and well-lit image of Coffee Cake Muffins.
    Summary: Nathan,

These muffins aren’t the most fun to make but they really make a splash at any breakfast or tea party. I love you dearly.

Mom


    Ingredients: 3 tablespoons flour, 3 tablespoons brown sugar, ¼ teaspoon cinnamon, 2 tablespoons butter, 3 tablespoons chopped walnuts or pecans, 1 ½ cups flour, ½ cup sugar, 1 ¼ teaspoon baking powder, ½ teaspoon cinnamon, ¼ teaspoon ground ginger, ¼ teaspoon baking soda, ¼ teaspoon salt, ¼ cup butter, 1  egg, ½ cup buttermilk or sour milk
    Tags: muffin, coffee cake, sweet, breakfast
    The image should be high quality and suitable for a recipe website.
    Do not include any letters or text in the image.
    Make sure the picture includes a garden gnome in it.
